findings.title: A scope requested in source is absent from the submission manifest.
findings.message: https://www.googleapis.com/auth/calendar.events appears in tracked source but is not declared in oauth.declaredScopes.
findings.remediation: Confirm which scope the shipped feature needs, then make the runtime request and intended consent-screen declaration match.

findings.title: A declared scope was not found in tracked source.
findings.message: https://www.googleapis.com/auth/calendar.readonly is declared in the manifest but was not found as a literal in supported tracked files.
findings.remediation: Remove an unused declaration or confirm that a supported runtime builds this scope dynamically and document that exception.

findings.title: Declared public and redirect hosts share the authorized-domain contract.
findings.message: No objective host mismatch was found in the secret-free manifest.
findings.remediation: Confirm domain ownership in Google Search Console before submission.

findings.title: Every declared scope maps to a feature and a recording step.
findings.message: The manifest contains a complete technical trace from scope to feature to storyboard.
findings.remediation: Record the live product as described and verify the final video manually.
